title: Mid Semester Exam Schedule Released
content: The mid semester exam schedule has been published. Please check with your department for the detailed timetable.

title: Hackathon Registration Open
content: Students can now register for the annual KCC hackathon. Last date for registration is March 20.

title: Library Maintenance
content: The library will remain closed on Sunday due to scheduled maintenance.

title: Placement Drive Announcement
content: Infosys campus placement drive will be conducted next week for final year students.
